title: "[GSSOC] Claim Issue #<Issue_Number>"
labels: gssoc
assignees: ""
---

### Issue Details
- **Issue Number you want to work on:** #
- **Issue Title:** 
- **Difficulty Level:** [Easy / Medium / Hard]

### Why do you want to work on this issue?
Briefly explain your familiarity with the language/tools involved (e.g. Rust, Node.js, CLI, testing) and how you plan to approach it.

### Commitment
- [ ] I agree to submit a Draft PR or show progress within **3 days** of being assigned this issue.
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/decodejatin/jatin-lean/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/decodejatin/jatin-lean/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
